nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 滩涂
nodes.summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

nodes.name: Purple-gaped honeyeater
nodes.summary: Purple-gaped honeyeater（Purple-gaped honeyeater，学名 Lichenostomus cratitius），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、滩涂。

nodes.name: Mallee Woodlands and Shrublands
nodes.summary: Mallee Woodlands and Shrublands是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Australian owlet-nightjar、Red-backed kingfisher、黄尾黑凤头鹦鹉等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to semi-arid southern Australia, where it inhabits mallee, tall heath and associated low eucalypt woodland.Menkhorst, P., Rogers, D., Clarke, R., Davies, J., Marsack, P., Franklin, K

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The main habitat type for purple-gaped honeyeater is mallee woodland and shrubland.Tzaros, C

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: (2021) Wildlife of the Box-Ironbark Country. 2nd Edition, CSIRO Publishing, Melbourne, Victoria, This includes bull mallee, with patches of green mallee or blue mallee. They also occur in yellow gum woodland with dense thickets of 'totem-poles' or violet honey-myrtle on low-lying flats and gullies in mallee areas. They are occasionally recorded in river red gums bordering waterways, and seasonally in red ironbark woodlands when they are in flower. Purple-gaped honeyeaters can also occasionally be found in gardens. They are gregarious, usually seen in pairs, or groups of 3-8 birds. Generally considered quiet and unobtrusive, except in spring when they may call often. They are known to regularly drink and bathe, particularly in warmer weather. Purple-gaped honeyeaters associate with yellow-plumed honeyeater and tawny-crowned honeyeater, but can be aggressive towards other honeyeaters, and frequently chase other birds, particularly when feeding
